problem id: 55dfe758
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(6) XOR SHR(4)) AND ROT(2)

examples:
  10001011 -> 00001000
  01001100 -> 00000000
  01000010 -> 00000000
  10110100 -> 00000010
  00010111 -> 01000000
  11001001 -> 00000100
  01111001 -> 01000101
  00110011 -> 11000000
  11000110 -> 00001000

query: 11000001
predicted answer: 00000100
